title: Milestone 4 — Canonical Artifacts (Audit + Hardening)
approach: audit + hardening pass: milestones 1-3 already encoded most of the canonical-artifact contract. This spec audits the nine ported prompts for four residual gaps (lazy creation absent in plan/research/ship/verify; slug validation absent in plan/research; gc active-slug inference wrong for the slugless Pi layer; two-surface contract not formalized), hardens them, and formalizes the lifecycle-state vs project-memory separation (ADR-007). No changes to substantive procedural content; only the four enumerated hardening edits + contract formalization.

success_criteria.criterion: Slug-validation regex present in all five lifecycle prompts
success_criteria.verify: for f in create plan research ship verify; do rg -q '\^\(\?=\.\{1,64\}\$\)\[a-z0-9\]' .pi/prompts/$f.md || { echo MISSING $f; exit 1; }; done

success_criteria.criterion: Lazy-creation mkdir present in the five lifecycle prompts
success_criteria.verify: for f in create plan research ship verify; do rg -q 'mkdir -p.*\.pi/artifacts' .pi/prompts/$f.md || { echo MISSING $f; exit 1; }; done
rg -q 'Two surfaces|two-surface|project memory.*separate|lifecycle state.*confined' AGENTS.md && rg -q 'ADR-007' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md

success_criteria.criterion: No regression in milestone-3 static suite (frontmatter 9/9, forbidden CLEAN, slug presence 5/5)
success_criteria.verify:
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const need={audit:["description","argument-hint"],create:["description","argument-hint"],fix:["description","argument-hint"],gc:["description"],init:["description","argument-hint"],plan:["description","argument-hint"],research:["description","argument-hint"],ship:["description","argument-hint"],verify:["description","argument-hint"]};for(const[f,keys]of Object.entries(need)){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const m=/^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
/.exec(s);if(!m)throw new Error(f+": no frontmatter");const got=[...m[1].matchAll(/^([\w-]+):/gm)].map(x=>x[1]);if(got.length!==keys.length||!keys.every(k=>got.includes(k)))throw new Error(f+": got ["+got+"] expected ["+keys+"]");}' && ! rg -q 'agent:|task\(|question\(|skill\(|write\(|\.active|spec\.md|prd\.json|tasks\.json|audit-pattern|batch-implement|deep-research|review-state\.json|/ui-slop-check|/compound|progress\.md|audit\.md' .pi/prompts/*.md && for f in create plan ship verify research; do rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/$f.md || exit 1; done
rg -q 'cannot declare completion|must not.*completion' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -qi 'sole.*verified|transcript only|no repository write' .pi/prompts/verify.md

tasks.title: Formalize the two-surface contract (AGENTS, PLAN, DECISIONS)
tasks.end_state: AGENTS.md Lifecycle artifacts block has a Two surfaces subsection: lifecycle state (4 canonical files, confined to slug) vs project memory (MEMORY.md, separate writable surface). PLAN.md lifecycle flow mirrors it. DECISIONS.md has ADR-007 documenting the two-surface tradeoff. Done before prompt hardening so the contract is authoritative.
tasks.verify: rg -q 'Two surfaces|two-surface|project memory.*separate|lifecycle state.*confined' AGENTS.md && rg -q 'ADR-007' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -q 'two surface|project memory' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md

tasks.title: Harden /plan and /research (slug regex + lazy creation)
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/plan.md and research.md validate <slug> with the canonical regex before filesystem access and do mkdir -p .pi/artifacts/<slug>/ before writes. All existing procedural content preserved. No OpenCode-only constructs introduced.
depends_on: Formalize the two-surface contract (AGENTS, PLAN, DECISIONS)
tasks.verify: for f in plan research; do rg -q '\^\(\?=\.\{1,64\}\$\)\[a-z0-9\]' .pi/prompts/$f.md && rg -q 'mkdir -p.*\.pi/artifacts' .pi/prompts/$f.md || { echo MISSING $f; exit 1; }; done && ! rg -q 'agent:|task\(|question\(|skill\(|write\(|\.active|spec\.md|prd\.json' .pi/prompts/plan.md .pi/prompts/research.md

tasks.title: Harden /ship and /verify (lazy creation; slug regex already present)
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/ship.md and verify.md do mkdir -p .pi/artifacts/<slug>/ before writes. Slug regex already present in both. Authority rules (ship no-completion, verify sole external) intact. All existing procedural content preserved.
tasks.verify: for f in ship verify; do rg -q 'mkdir -p.*\.pi/artifacts' .pi/prompts/$f.md || { echo MISSING $f; exit 1; }; done && rg -q 'cannot declare completion|must not.*completion' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -qi 'sole.*verified|transcript only|no repository write' .pi/prompts/verify.md

tasks.title: Fix /gc (remove active-slug inference)
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/gc.md has no 'active slug' inference. It grades project-wide template domains (plugins/commands/skills/docs) without a slug and optionally accepts a <slug> to grade that slug's lifecycle artifacts. No .active/latest.
depends_on: Harden /ship and /verify (lazy creation; slug regex already present)

tasks.title: Record candidate evidence (pending final no-write verification)
tasks.end_state: .pi/artifacts/pi-template/TODO.md and PROGRESS.md and .opencode/state.md record the milestone-4 hardening complete but verification PENDING (not VERIFIED). Commands, exit codes, limitations logged.

tasks.title: Close OpenCode feature implementation state
tasks.end_state: spec.md marks each bounded task complete (without VERIFIED); roadmap.md milestone 4 marked implementation-done/verification-pending. jq validates prd.json.
depends_on: Record candidate evidence (pending final no-write verification)

tasks.title: Final no-write verification (external declaration only)
tasks.end_state: All success-criteria checks pass; source command bodies unchanged; git diff --check clean; local HEAD equals remote main and main:master; VERIFIED declared in response/transcript only; no repository write after the final fingerprint.
tasks.verify: run all success-criteria commands; git diff --exit-code -- .opencode/command/; git diff --check; git rev-parse HEAD == origin/main == origin/master
